ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN code of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange (e.g., New York, London) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price record was recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in stock price on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the volume record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the volume record was recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the trend record belongs to */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trend record was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is set for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was executed */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Value of the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the event is related to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earnings report, product launch) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_events_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the split applies to */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurs */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the dividend applies to */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
